mapper.update:
update share
audit_status = #{auditStatus},
reason = #{reason},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, is_original AS isOriginal, author, cover, summary, price, download_url AS downloadUrl, buy_count AS buyCount, show_flag AS showFlag, audit_status AS auditStatus, reason FROM share
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, is_original AS isOriginal, author, cover, summary, price, download_url AS downloadUrl, buy_count AS buyCount, show_flag AS showFlag, audit_status AS auditStatus, reason FROM share
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND (create_time < #{lastCreateTime} OR (create_time = #{lastCreateTime} AND id < #{lastId}))
ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO share (id, user_id, title, create_time, update_time, is_original, author, cover, summary, price, download_url, buy_count, show_flag, audit_status, reason) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.userId}, #{item.title}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.isOriginal}, #{item.author}, #{item.cover}, #{item.summary}, #{item.price}, #{item.downloadUrl}, #{item.buyCount}, #{item.showFlag}, #{item.auditStatus}, #{item.reason})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM share
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
